confirmed_conclusion: Within Drude model: Re(epsilon) changes < 0.21% from 4K to 295K. Score impact < +0.19%.
removed: Removed overconfident statement 'tool valid at room temp'. Drude model is an approximation.
limitations: Drude single-band model does not fully capture Au dielectric at low T
No comparison with low-T experimental dielectric data
Quantum effects in nanogap not included

model_inconsistency_note.issue: qubit_noise.html uses effective nanoparticle response function, NOT bare Au dielectric constant

qubit_noise_model.interpretation: Clausius-Mossotti type correction for nanoparticle shape (LZ=0.039) and surrounding medium (EPS_M=2.25). Effective re at 807nm ~ -25 + 55 = +30 (positive), NOT the bare Au dielectric constant.

model_inconsistency_note.conclusion: Cin temperature analysis (calculation 2) uses bare Au Drude dielectric. qubit_noise.html uses effective nanoparticle response with shape correction. These are different physical quantities and cannot be directly compared. The 0.21% temperature variation conclusion applies only to the bare Drude model.
